en: A: Is Lisin at home, please? *[Lisin] Please change the name to an ethnic woman.
She’s at home, please come in.
A: Is Lisin at home, please? *[Lisin] Please change the name to an ethnic woman.

ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She's not here, what can I do for you?
B: Who is it?

ab: nawmo, amani yako ka Tavarai, moleba.
en: A: Grandpa, I'm Panay, please open the door. *[Panay] Please change the name to an ethnic woman.
B: Who is it?

ab: Solaging, Lavaoso zako, wakela ko sila’e mosowa.
en: A: Kacaw, I'm Mayaw, I've come to play with you. *[Kacaw][Mayaw] Please change the names of the women of each tribe.
A: Long time no see.

ab: eene, mabarengere ko mosawa. niyama takalaelang.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let's chat!
B: Please sit down and have some tea.
A: Thank you.
B: Please have some tea.
A: (Exclamation) Your tea is delicious.
B: Let's eat fruit!

ab: eene, lo celeta kai akanekanea ka madro matiyadalame.
ch: A:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.
B: How is the fruit?
A:Yes, it's really delicious.

ab: madonga kai waga ki tinali ka kwaobo, niyma kwane.
ch: B:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!
A: Okay, I'll go wash my hands.

ab: ’alaynga kwane si ongolo, maela neso sa bazabaza.
ch: B:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you're not an outsider.
A: I ate a lot, I'm full.
B: Eat more, don't be polite.
A:Well, it's delicious.

ab: ai davacengana ko, naw kelanga ceele mosowa.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I'm leaving, I'll see you next time.
B: Okay, goodbye.
A: It's late, I'm going home.
B:Come again next time!
B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: eene, lo ocogo so niyamanga niyana kivaevang.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
